title: Cat Grooming Glove, Reusable Cat and Dog Allfound Hair Remover Tool Pet Grooming Glove for Dogs Bathing Pet Hair Removal Cleaning Brush Mitt Deshedding Washing
features: Product Included: You will receive 1 piece of pet grooming glove that can easily clean up the hair shed by pets such as cats and dogs.
Product Size: The size of this cat grooming glove is about 17x13cm/6.7x5in. The glove area is large enough, which means you can clean a large area with pet hair with just a few wipes.
Premium Material: This double-sided pet grooming glove is made of premium-quality EVA, which is durable, washable and reusable, and maintains the cleaning effect for a long time.

Thoughtful Design: This pet hair remover glove adopts a thoughtful design, which is divided into a two-way cleaning cloth. Just move the glove back and forth or left and right to collect pet hair efficiently.

Versatile Use: This pet grooming glove is practical and can be used to clean pet hair on carpets, furniture, car seats, sofas, sheets and clothes. It can also be used to comb the pet’s hair directly, which is gentle and efficient.
description: Specification: Color: black Material: EVA Product Size: 17x13cm/6.7x5in Package details: 1 x pet grooming glove Note: Due to manual measurement, the size and weight may have a certain error. Due to the difference between different monitors, there may be a slight color difference existed.

specifications_table.Care Instructions: ‎Spot clean or hand wash as needed. Avoid machine washing.
